title: Oracle → Snowflake Data Migration Pipeline
desc: Designed and implemented an enterprise-scale data migration pipeline to move legacy Oracle data into Snowflake using AWS services. Ensured high data integrity, scalability, and performance across large datasets.
highlights: Handled multi-language encoding (UTF-8, Japanese, special characters)
Built validation layer using Redshift Spectrum
Optimized Snowflake loading performance and file formats

impact.performance: Optimized load time and query efficiency

architecture.description: Data extracted from Oracle using AWS DMS, staged in S3, loaded into Snowflake using COPY INTO, and validated using Redshift Spectrum.

features: Automated bulk data loading using COPY INTO
Schema mapping and transformation handling
Data validation framework across systems
Error handling for encoding and delimiter issues
challenges: Handling mixed character encoding (Japanese, Chinese, special symbols)
Maintaining consistency across environments (Dev, Stage, Prod)
solutions: Created multiple file formats for different encodings

title: Azure Data Engineering Pipeline
desc: Designed scalable ETL pipelines using Azure Data Factory and Databricks to process and transform large datasets.
highlights: Built scalable ETL pipelines using Azure services
Optimized data transformation workflows using Databricks

architecture.description: Data ingested from ADLS, processed using Azure Data Factory and Databricks, and loaded into Snowflake for analytics.

features: End-to-end ETL pipeline orchestration
Data transformation using PySpark
Integration with Snowflake for analytics
Scalable and modular pipeline design
solutions: Implemented monitoring and error handling mechanisms

title: Health & Wellness Data Integration
desc: Built an end-to-end healthcare data integration platform using Snowflake and Azure to process clinical, pharmacy, and claims data with scalable, real-time pipelines.
highlights: Designed Medallion architecture (Bronze, Silver, Gold) for healthcare data processing
Integrated multiple healthcare domains including clinical, pharmacy, and claims
Enabled real-time data ingestion using event-driven Snowpipe pipelines
Built analytics-ready data models for reporting and business insights

impact.accuracy: Improved data consistency and patient-level unification
impact.performance: Enabled near real-time ingestion and automated pipeline execution

architecture.description: Healthcare data is ingested into Azure Data Lake, processed through event-driven pipelines using Snowpipe, transformed across Bronze, Silver, and Gold layers in Snowflake, and exposed for analytics and reporting.

features: End-to-end healthcare data ingestion and processing pipeline
Medallion architecture for structured data transformation
Real-time ingestion using Snowpipe with event-driven architecture
Incremental processing using Streams and Tasks
Audit and monitoring framework for data tracking
Schema-on-read ingestion for flexible data loading
challenges: Integrating heterogeneous healthcare datasets from multiple domains
Handling continuous data arrival with scalable ingestion mechanisms
Maintaining data consistency and historical tracking across patient records
Ensuring pipeline observability and error tracking
solutions: Implemented Medallion architecture to separate raw, clean, and business layers
Enabled Snowpipe with event-based triggers for automated ingestion
Designed incremental pipelines using Streams and Tasks for efficiency
Built audit tables and monitoring logic for end-to-end data visibility

title: Campaign Data Integration & Processing Platform
desc: Designed and supported a scalable data platform for campaign execution, audience processing, and performance analytics using Snowflake and Azure-based pipelines.
highlights: Built end-to-end data pipelines for campaign lifecycle management
Enabled audience processing and campaign execution workflows
Developed data models for campaign performance and ROI analysis
Automated data ingestion and transformation for large-scale datasets

impact.accuracy: Improved data consistency across campaign workflows
impact.volume: Handled high-volume audience and campaign datasets
impact.performance: Reduced manual effort through automation and reliable pipelines

architecture.description: Data is ingested from multiple source systems into Azure Data Lake, processed through ADF and Databricks, transformed in Snowflake using a Medallion architecture, and consumed by downstream campaign execution and analytics systems.

features: End-to-end campaign data pipeline orchestration
Audience data processing and transformation workflows
Medallion architecture implementation in Snowflake
Automated data ingestion using Snowpipe
Incremental processing using Streams and Tasks
Stored procedure-based workflow automation
challenges: Handling complex campaign lifecycle and audience processing logic
Ensuring data consistency across multiple interconnected systems
Managing high-volume datasets with strict performance requirements
Maintaining pipeline stability in production environments
solutions: Designed structured Medallion architecture for clear data layer separation
Implemented validation and deduplication logic to improve data quality
Enabled event-driven ingestion and incremental processing for scalability
Introduced monitoring, retry mechanisms, and failure handling strategies
